hero_subtitle: SFTY structures alerts and provider outputs into auditable cases to support VASPs with clear workflows, evidence preservation, regulatory rule updates and scalable compliance review.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance workflows depend on manual handoffs
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with disconnected provider outputs that slow case creation and review processes. This fragmentation weakens audit readiness and makes it difficult to maintain clear links between regulatory changes, decisions and evidence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes fragmented provider data, regulatory triggers, review actions and evidence into one unified case management workflow for compliance teams to accelerate reviews and preserve audit-ready records.
workflow_description: SFTY routes alerts from multiple providers into structured cases where reviews, decisions, evidence collection and reporting form a controlled compliance process.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides VASPs a provider-neutral compliance layer that turns isolated review triggers into structured cases, decisions, audit-ready evidence and connected regulatory workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs requiring structured case creation, audit-ready evidence, bank due diligence and controlled enterprise deployment within regulated AML compliance workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support case creation from compliance alerts
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how cases link alerts and internal compliance reviews
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence is preserved in case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for secure compliance operations environments
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams a connected platform to connect KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, screening, case management, and reporting into structured, auditable workflows above existing providers.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage compliance cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes alerts and provider outputs into cases, assigns reviewers, tracks decisions and evidence, and manages escalation workflows to streamline compliance review and action.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, provider results and evidence packages to support audit readiness and regulatory inspection preparation.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works as a compliance control layer, integrating outputs from KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and reporting providers into a single operational workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured reviews, decisions, regulatory rule updates, cases, evidence and reports.
final_title: Turn compliance review triggers into structured cases
final_description: Review how SFTY connects alerts, provider results and regulatory rules into audit-ready cases and scalable workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
